text: There is a quiet curiosity stirring within me as I stand in this clean, modern space—oddly tilted, as if my perspective is askew and the world is inviting me to see things differently. With each step closer to the 'R+D' exhibit, curiosity melds with excitement. I am drawn by the promise of innovative ideas and thoughtful connections between humanity and technology. The environment feels both controlled and open to possibility, as if knowledge awaits only the courage to ask the next question. I feel like an explorer in a domain of ideas, eager for discovery.
